text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: During a training session with Inari One...

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text:
I-incredible! It's like Inari's tearing up the track as
she goes!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whew, I've gone and got a li'l messy. But hey,
these dirt stains are a badge of honor!
choice_data_list: You sure put a lot of power into your run!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sure. I've been confident in my strength since
long before I even came here. Doesn't mean I
shouldn't keep aimin' higher, though!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
This is the biggest stage, with the flashiest
fireworks, after all. Havin' a li'l extra firepower
can't hurt.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That said, today felt real good. Guess it's 'bout
time to wrap up, eh?

text_block_list.name: Younger Student A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, um... Inari! If it's okay with you, would you
go partner running with us?

text_block_list.name: Younger Student B
text_block_list.text: We want to learn from your running style!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: H-hold up! Give an Horsegirl some space!
choice_data_list: I can get why they're so eager, though.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Geez, ya talk like it's got nothin' to do with ya.
Guess I shouldn't complain 'bout bein' popular
though.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...Wouldn't have the attention at all if it weren't
for a certain someone.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh, all righty then! I'm up for another lap or
two!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, put more back into it! If ya wanna get
your engines revvin', ya gotta step on the gas!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Inari One continues to offer the younger
Umamusume her powerful advice.
